title: Omega (designation)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Omega}}
{{Image}}
'''''Omega''''' was a standard designation for [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] found aboard [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warships or [[Space station/Legends|space stations]].

A typical duty for these craft was disabling and boarding enemy craft, or [[Proton rocket/Legends|heavy rocket]] attack such as the assault on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']].

Another standard designation for Imperial DX-9s was [[Sigma group|''Sigma'']].

Omega was also the name of a [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese]] letter.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
